name: holdout-2026-bucket1-scoutgate-rolegate
description: 2026 event-key bucket-1 holdout for coverage-aware ScoutGate RoleV3 variants. RoleGate adds a stricter RoleV3Gated feature family: scout defense enters role reasoning through confidence-shrunk ScoutGate values, and gated role selection requires confidence >= 0.35.
modelNames: No-Future Strong RoleV3 Residual-Ridge Scaled-Archetype Ensemble K=1.10 W=0.20 P=0.00 S=0.15 M=8 CR=0.100 DR=0.050 RW=0.40 L=75 C=35

notes: Second deterministic holdout slice for the ScoutGate near-tie.
The bucket prevents tuning to a single event family.

RoleGate is a role-feature leakage/overfit pressure test: it should win only if confidence-shrunk scout role evidence improves held-out replay, not merely because raw scout defense sneaks through role features.
RG=C0.35 means the gated role summary records all role signals but only selects a defender when the pre-match role confidence reaches 0.35.
